src: A retro helmet with a glossy finish, featuring a vibrant yellow top half and a contrasting deep red bottom half. It has a clear visor and a black circular vent on the side.
edit: A retro-styled helmet with a vivid blue top and bright orange bottom. It features a transparent visor and a silver circular vent, giving a modern twist to a classic look.

per_image_non_shared_src.zero-take-9dk53RXENvw-unsplash: The object rests on a blue surface, positioned to the right side, with a backdrop of a light brick wall and a partially visible neon sign above it.
